title: Immersivity
description: A Minecraft modpack centered around one thing: Immersive Portals.
body:
## Description
**Immersivity** is a Minecraft modpack centered around one thing: [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals). It makes use of many other mods such as [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) and [Bits and Chisels](https://modrinth.com/mod/bits-and-chisels) to elevate the experience and fun while still keeping the game running smoothly with mods like [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) and [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe).
## FAQ
**Q:** Will this modpack ever be updated for past / future versions?\
**A:** This modpack will probably never be given any support for any version before MC 1.20.1. As for future versions, you can expect them to be supported once the mods the modpack uses support them as well.

**Q:** What gave you the inspiration to make this modpack?\
**A:** What kind of question even is this? It's not like this is some painting.

**Q:** Forge?\
**A:** Nope.

<details><summary>All Mods Included</summary>
  
[Bits and Chisels](https://modrinth.com/mod/bits-and-chisels) - Turn Blocks Into Small Bits With Chisels; Build All The Things.\
[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs).\
[Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3) - Removes useless information from the debug screen.\
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods.\
[Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) - A mod that allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window.\
[Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - Adds culling to leaf blocks, providing a huge performance boost over vanilla.\
[DashLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader) - Launch at the speed of light.\
[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.\
[Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) - Boost your Minecraft. Play together without a server. Customize your character. And more.\
[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce FPS lag with block entities, as well as customize them with resource packs.\
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.\
[FabricSkyboxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop) - FabricSkyBoxes Interoperability for MCPatcher/OptiFine Skies.\
[FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) - Allows resource packs to define custom skyboxes.\
[FastAnim](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastanim) - Speeds up entity animation calculations.\
[FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - Lets you return to the Title Screen early while your world is still saving in the background.\
[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations.\
[FeyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/feytweaks) - Mod for optimizing signs and beacons.\
[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - A 3D animation library for entities, blocks, items, armor, and more.\
[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.\
[Immersive Portal Gun](https://modrinth.com/mod/portal-gun) - Portal Gun with Immersive Portals.\
[Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) - See through portals and teleport seamlessly.\
[Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) - Speed up the loading of your world.\
[Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages.\
[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod.\
[Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server.\
[Mod Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-loading-screen) - An advanced loading screen with the loading progress of mods.\
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.\
[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models.\
[Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) - Improves client performance and play experience on large multiplayer servers.\
[Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) - Lets you change the size of most entities, shrinking them smaller or growing them larger.\
[ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) - Fixes Tooltips from runnning off the screen.\
[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge.\
[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric.

</details>
